description_long: This is a compact, rectangular handbag with a structured form and a warm tan exterior. The front and back surfaces are adorned with an ornate, symmetrical embroidered floral motif in a light cream color, adding a touch of elegance. The bag features a single, long, braided chain strap in a matching light tone, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear. The sides of the bag are reinforced with vertical cream-colored strips, providing both structural support and visual contrast. A metallic clasp closure is positioned at the top center, offering secure access to the interior. The overall design is refined and decorative, making it suitable for both casual and formal urban outings.
description: A structured tan handbag with ornate cream embroidery, a braided chain strap, and a metallic clasp closure. Decorative and elegant, it features contrasting cream side panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan surface with cream floral embroidery and the full length of the braided chain strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, cream vertical side panel, and attachment points of the chain strap.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with identical cream embroidery and the chain strap draped to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cream side panel and the chain strap's attachment, similar to view 1.
attribute_strap_type: Single long braided chain strap, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear, non-adjustable, attached at both ends to the top corners.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Metallic clasp closure located at the top center of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: Ornate cream floral embroidery on both front and back panels; braided chain strap.
attribute_pattern: Ornate floral embroidery pattern on a solid tan background.
